title: Reproducibility package: Twenty Years of Central Nervous System Tumours in Germany (ICD-10-GM C70-C72, 2004-2023)
description: Code, aggregate ZfKD DatenBrowser exports, tidy tables, figures, audit trail and peer-review logs supporting the paper 'Twenty Years of Central Nervous System Tumours in Germany' submitted to the Journal of Cancer Research and Clinical Oncology (2026).
